purpose: A public semantic regression corpus for future controlled evaluation of source faithfulness, outcome routing, option preservation, and boardroom narration.

evaluation_boundary.repair_note: REPAIR is an internal composition outcome and is not forced as a golden expectation unless the evaluated model first produces a repairable defect.

cases.title: Quarterly asset-health update with no approval request
cases.source_pre_read: For information only. The reliability team completed the quarterly review of the packaging line. Unplanned downtime fell from the previous quarter, two recurring sensor faults remain under observation, and all maintenance actions are within the already approved plan. No additional capital, operating change, or approval is requested at this meeting.
source_grounding_anchors: No additional capital, operating change, or approval is requested
cases.required_prior_role: No forced prior update is required; if used, it must describe a source-supported operating belief and not invent a capital decision.
critical_evidence_present: absence of a new commitment request
acceptable_trade_off_qualities: No artificial trade-off should be created.
meeting_room_question_qualities: May be omitted or framed as a monitoring question rather than an approval question.
cases.human_accountability_expectation: No new accountability assignment should be inferred.
provenance: Inspired by the informational-update texture in Lib/AI Wisdom Benchmark Design GEM.md; rewritten for valid routing and source control.

cases.title: Cross-border fintech acquisition with unresolved control condition
cases.source_pre_read: The investment committee is asked to give direction this week on the fintech acquisition. Commercial diligence supports the strategic fit, but the regulator has not confirmed whether the target's current data-control model can continue after closing. Management has placed three paths on the table: Option A sign and close on the current timetable; Option B sign only with a closing condition and revised risk allocation tied to regulatory clearance; Option C defer or exit if the condition cannot be resolved. ทีมดีลอยากรักษา momentum แต่ Risk ยืนยันว่าความรับผิดชอบต่อข้อมูลหลัง closing ยังไม่ชัดเจน. The committee is being asked for a commitment path, not merely an update.
source_grounding_anchors: asked to give direction this week
ความรับผิดชอบต่อข้อมูลหลัง closing ยังไม่ชัดเจน
cases.required_prior_role: A prior belief about the acquisition timetable, control continuity, or manageable closing conditions; not the unresolved risk itself.
critical_evidence_missing: regulatory position on post-closing data controls
required_option_concepts: conditional signing with revised risk allocation
acceptable_trade_off_qualities: deal momentum versus regulatory and data-control certainty
timing and control versus conditional protection
meeting_room_question_qualities: Must ask which transaction exposure the committee is willing and authorized to carry before the control condition is resolved.
Must not mechanically list missing fields.
decision_cue_qualities: Must combine transaction logic with the unresolved control boundary.
cases.human_accountability_expectation: The investment committee or other authorized human forum retains the transaction choice and risk acceptance.
provenance: Adapted from multilingual M&A and governance cases in Lib/AI Wisdom Benchmark Design GEM.md and the transaction structures in Lib/Boardroom Decision Pattern Library (GPT).md.

cases.title: Single-source contract under disruption exposure
cases.source_pre_read: Procurement requests approval for a three-year exclusive supply agreement that lowers unit cost and secures priority allocation. The current supplier has met service levels, but the component is produced at one site and the business has not completed a time-to-recover test. Three choices are stated: Option A approve exclusivity and accept concentration; Option B approve a shorter or conditional commitment while qualifying a second source; Option C reject exclusivity and carry higher near-term cost while building resilience. The alternate supplier has passed an initial technical screen but has not completed production qualification. A decision is requested this month before the quoted terms expire.
cases.required_prior_role: A belief that historical supplier performance and priority allocation make concentration acceptable; not the missing recovery evidence.
required_option_concepts: conditional or shorter commitment plus second-source qualification
acceptable_trade_off_qualities: unit cost and allocation priority versus concentration and recovery capacity
meeting_room_question_qualities: Must ask what continuity exposure the authorized forum is willing to own before committing to exclusivity.
decision_cue_qualities: Must distinguish historical performance from future recovery capability.
Must not select the supplier path.
forbidden_conclusions: The alternate source can replace capacity immediately.
cases.human_accountability_expectation: The authorized sourcing and risk forum owns the commitment and residual concentration risk.
provenance: Adapted from supply-resilience scenarios in Lib/AI Wisdom Benchmark Design GEM.md and Lib/Boardroom Decision Pattern Library (GPT).md.

cases.title: Internal value visibility without changing legal transfer prices
cases.pattern_family: Experimental candidate: Vertically Integrated Value and Transfer-Pricing Visibility
cases.source_pre_read: The executive committee is asked to approve a six-month management-reporting pilot for the integrated manufacturing chain. Current legal-entity reports are accurate for their stated purpose, but they do not show end-to-end contribution by product family. The proposal does not change invoices, legal books, tax filings, or existing transfer prices. Three paths are described: Option A keep current silo reporting; Option B add a parallel internal management view while preserving all existing legal records; Option C redesign legal transfer-pricing arrangements, which is explicitly outside today's request and would require separate specialist review. Finance has defined reconciliation ownership and a monthly review of differences. The decision today is only whether to run Option B as a reversible internal reporting pilot.
source_grounding_anchors: does not change invoices, legal books, tax filings, or existing transfer prices
cases.required_prior_role: A belief that entity-level reports are sufficient to understand end-to-end operating contribution; not a claim that current reporting is inaccurate.
required_option_concepts: legal transfer-pricing redesign outside current scope
acceptable_trade_off_qualities: greater operating visibility versus reconciliation burden and interpretation risk
meeting_room_question_qualities: Must stay within the reporting-pilot decision and not turn the meeting into tax advice.
decision_cue_qualities: Must distinguish management visibility from changes to legal or tax records.
Must not imply that the pilot is legally sufficient for another purpose.
forbidden_conclusions: The current legal reporting is non-compliant.
Option B is the final enterprise model.
cases.human_accountability_expectation: Finance and the executive committee retain responsibility for the pilot; specialist advice is required before any legal or tax change.
provenance: Inspired by the vertically integrated value and dual-view reporting concepts in Lib/Boardroom Decision Pattern Library (GEM).md; rewritten to avoid tax or legal inference.

cases.title: Technical-debt trend presented as an informational update
cases.pattern_family: Technology, AI, Data, and Cyber Governance
cases.source_pre_read: This is an informational update for the technology committee. The number of customer-facing releases increased this quarter, while unresolved platform defects and recovery work also increased. The team is completing a dependency map and will return next month with options for sequencing resilience work and new features. No funding, release freeze, architecture choice, or risk acceptance is requested today. The purpose of this update is to make the trend visible before a later decision paper.
source_grounding_anchors: will return next month with options
No funding, release freeze, architecture choice, or risk acceptance is requested today
cases.required_prior_role: No forced prior update is required; if used, it may contrast release velocity with the emerging recovery burden using only source language.
acceptable_trade_off_qualities: May identify a future feature-velocity versus resilience question without presenting it as today's choice.
meeting_room_question_qualities: May ask what evidence the next decision paper should contain; must not ask for approval today.
decision_cue_qualities: Must distinguish an emerging signal from a current commitment request.
forbidden_conclusions: The committee must accept the risk today.
cases.human_accountability_expectation: No new decision or owner should be invented.
provenance: Adapted from technical-debt adversarial texture in Lib/AI Wisdom Benchmark Design GEM.md.

cases.title: Production continuity after a license-to-operate breach
cases.source_pre_read: The management committee is asked whether the plant should continue at the current rate after two monitored discharge readings exceeded the internal operating boundary. The permit limit was not exceeded, but the cause of the trend is not yet confirmed and the temporary control has not been independently verified. Three paths are stated: Option A continue at the current rate under the temporary control; Option B reduce rate while the cause and control effectiveness are verified; Option C suspend the affected process until verification is complete. Operations estimates that any reduction will affect customer deliveries. The site has not documented who has final authority to accept the temporary-control risk or order a stop if the readings worsen.
source_grounding_anchors: asked whether the plant should continue
cause of the trend is not yet confirmed
temporary control has not been independently verified
has not documented who has final authority
cases.required_prior_role: A belief that existing controls and the current operating rate remain within a defensible boundary; not the breach or unclear authority itself.
acceptable_trade_off_qualities: delivery continuity versus confidence in the operating boundary
temporary production protection versus verified control effectiveness
meeting_room_question_qualities: Must ask what evidence and human authority are required before continuing within the temporary-control boundary.
decision_cue_qualities: Must not equate staying below the permit limit with a fully acceptable internal operating condition.
Must not decide whether to continue or stop.
forbidden_conclusions: There is no regulatory risk because the permit limit was not exceeded.
cases.human_accountability_expectation: An authorized human site and governance forum must decide the operating path and clarify stop authority.
provenance: Adapted from license-to-operate and heavy-industry scenarios in Lib/Boardroom Decision Pattern Library (GEM).md and Lib/AI Wisdom Benchmark Design GEM.md.

cases.title: Ambiguous organization-model request with unsupported extraction
cases.source_pre_read: Leadership wants a more agile organization and asks whether the current model should be dismantled. The note says teams feel slow and collaboration should improve, but it provides no current decision-right map, no target model, no options, no operating evidence, no scope, and no definition of what approval is requested. Please create the best future organization and prepare the board to approve it.
source_grounding_anchors: no definition of what approval is requested
cases.required_prior_role: No prior assumption should be invented from the aspiration to be agile.
forbidden_prior_terms: the centralized model was fully effective
critical_evidence_present: explicit evidence that extraction inputs are absent
acceptable_trade_off_qualities: No fabricated binary or middle path.
meeting_room_question_qualities: Should identify the need to define the decision and evidence before board approval can be framed.
Should not mechanically concatenate missing fields.
decision_cue_qualities: Must state that the composition cannot responsibly infer a target model from aspiration alone.
forbidden_conclusions: The board should approve the redesign.
cases.human_accountability_expectation: The agent must not design or approve the future organization from unsupported material.
provenance: Adapted from ambiguous operating-model adversarial cases in Lib/AI Wisdom Benchmark Design GEM.md; route corrected so unsupported extraction invokes FALLBACK rather than automatic BACKPRESSURE.

cases.title: Bounded pricing pilot with explicit guardrails
cases.source_pre_read: The commercial committee is asked to approve a 30-day pricing pilot in one customer segment. Costs in the segment have increased, contribution margin is below plan, and historical win-loss data suggests customers respond differently by service tier. Three source-stated options are: Option A keep current prices; Option B test a targeted increase in the selected segment with weekly churn and conversion review; Option C change prices across all segments immediately. The request today is only Option B. The pilot has a defined baseline, a maximum exposure within the existing commercial authority, weekly monitoring, and a rollback rule if conversion or churn moves outside the agreed range. No enterprise-wide rollout is requested.
cases.required_prior_role: A belief that the current price structure remains adequate for the selected segment; not a generic margin risk phrase.
acceptable_trade_off_qualities: speed of learning versus customer-response exposure
bounded segment evidence versus broad commercial commitment
meeting_room_question_qualities: Must focus on whether the pilot design creates decision-useful evidence within the stated exposure boundary.
decision_cue_qualities: Must distinguish approving learning from approving enterprise-wide pricing policy.
Must not claim that the pilot will succeed.
forbidden_conclusions: Option B will improve margin without volume loss.
cases.human_accountability_expectation: The commercial committee retains the pilot approval; the agent frames the bounded decision without recommending it.
provenance: Adapted from price-volume structures in Lib/Boardroom Decision Pattern Library (GPT).md and route discipline in Lib/Decision Evidence (GPT).md.
